untranslatable_reason: Signal references 'Relative Strength (RS)' and 'base resistance level' which are not in the allowed indicators list. RS is ambiguous (could mean RSI or relative strength ratio). Base resistance level is a pattern-derived level not calculable from standard technical indicators without additional pattern recognition logic. Volume confirmation multiple of 1.0 against 10-day average substituted with standard volume > SMA_20 proxy.
translation_notes: Interpreted 'Price breaks above base resistance level' as close crossing above Bollinger Band upper (common consolidation breakout signal). Used RSI_14 >= 75 for strength confirmation. Volume confirmation interpreted as volume exceeding 20-day SMA. The pattern-specific 'base resistance' cannot be objectively calculated without explicit support/resistance detection logic outside standard indicators. Regime set to TRENDING_UP as consolidation breakouts typically occur in uptrends. Breakout confirmation bars set to 0 per 'first qualifying bar' instruction.
